description: Eagle Nuclear Energy Corp. operates as a mining and exploration company focused on mineral exploration and development in North America. The company is a nuclear energy company that combines domestic uranium exploration with proprietary Small Modular Reactor (SMR) technology. It also develops modular nuclear reactors to provide power for industrial and grid applications. The company was founded in 2023 and is headquartered in Reno, Nevada.
